title: DeviceIdentity and DeviceTrustProfile
description: Contracts for local device identity attestation and trust profile binding. DeviceIdentity establishes a stable, hardware-anchored device identifier. DeviceTrustProfile records the current trust level, active policies, and attestation validity window.

DeviceIdentity.title: DeviceIdentity
DeviceIdentity.description: Stable, hardware-anchored identity for a local SourceOS workstation.

platform.description: Linux-first platform tag. macOS surfaces are not first-class identity anchors.

publicKeyFingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the device's public key (hex or base64url).

genesisRef.description: Reference to the genesis identity packet (if enrolled in SourceOS identity mesh).

DeviceTrustProfile.title: DeviceTrustProfile
DeviceTrustProfile.description: Current trust level and active policy set for a local device.

trustLevel.description: Device trust level. Local-first does not mean policy-free: untrusted and provisional devices operate under restricted capability sets.

attestedBy.description: Identity or service that issued this trust attestation.

policies.description: Active policy identifiers that govern this device's operation scope.

restrictions.description: Capability restrictions imposed on this device at the current trust level.
